message:
fix: wire isDemoData and isRefreshing in ML Jobs, ML Notebooks, and CRD Health cards (#8677)

ML Jobs and ML Notebooks hardcoded isDemoData: true instead of reading
it from the data hook, so the Demo badge showed even when the hook could
provide real data. CRD Health never passed isRefreshing to
useCardLoadingState, so the refresh icon never animated during background
fetches.

- Add isDemoData and isRefreshing fields to useDemoData return shape
- Wire isDemoData and isRefreshing from hooks in MLJobs and MLNotebooks
- Add isRefreshing state tracking to useCRDs hook
- Pass isRefreshing through CRDHealth to useCardLoadingState

Fixes #8664, Fixes #8665, Fixes #8669

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
